case_title: SUSLOVSKY, VIKTOR vs. SILVERMAN, FREDERICK R

docket_entries.description: JUDGE GEORGE CHOPPELAS ARLENE HELFRICH FOR PLTF. PAUL S. COHEN FOR DEFT. 11:15 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PARTIES HAVE ARRIVED AT A STIPULATION, TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD BY PLTF'S ATTY AS FOLLOWS: THAT DEFT HAS RELINQ- UIST ALL CLAIMS OF POSSESSION OF PROPERTY, THAT DEFT INTENDS TO REMOVE ALL BELONGINGS BY 10/16/93 & RETURN KEYS THEN, THAT PLTF. WILL ALLOW DEFT TO REMOVE PROPERTY FROM 7AM TO 7PM 10/16/93. BOTH CAN BRING NEUTRAL OBSERVER, THAT ANY PROPERTY LEFT AFTER SAID DATE PLTF. CAN DISPOSE. ALL RESERVE CLAIMS FOR MONEY DAMAGES; PLTF. FOR PAST DUE RENTS & DEFT FOR RIGHT TO WRONGFUL EVICTION. CONT'D TO 10/18/93 (NO APPEARANCE BY PARTIES, BUT COURT TO BE ADVISED IF PLTF. WILL AMEND COMPLAINT OR DISMISS CASE.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMON AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUSLOVSKY, VIKTOR SERVED AUG-31-1993, CERTIFIED OR REGISTERED MAIL - OUT OF STATE AS TO DEFENDANT SILVERMAN, FREDERICK R
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SILVERMAN, FREDERICK R
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUSLOVSKY, VIKTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SILVERMAN, FREDERICK R SUMMONS ISSUED
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUSLOVSKY, VIKTOR COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-05-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
PHOTOCOPY FOR DEFENDANT SILVERMAN, FREDERICK R
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE COURT TRIAL OF OCT-05-1993 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
